productName: Trichome Infused Pre-roll Super Lemon Haze - 1g
description: A sativa infused joint built on Super Lemon Haze and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of lemon, citrus, and lime, delivering a bright, heady lift. Pace yourself.
